subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! The holy fragrances that waft from the gardens of the Abhá Kingdom have perfumed the spiritual senses of the faithful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق از نفحات قدس که از حدائق ملکوت ابهی منتشر مشام روحانیان معطر و از
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
